en: on the first take. No, I'm gonna go to Women Now, just cause they help out women now.
ko: 내가 첫 번째 촬영에서 찾고 있던 거야.

en: It's not, it's actually, it's really complicated, okay?
And I don't feel like talking about it in my fragile state.
My mom uses color-safe bleach. Go Carol.
ko: 우리 엄마는 색상 안전 표백제를 사용해.

en: Cause they were talking about in health class, how pregnancy, it can often lead to an infant.
Typically, yeah, yeah. All I see is pork swords.
I think you definitely bring something to the table. Charisma.
And I'm like, thanks a heap, Coyote Ugly.
This cactus gram stings even worse than your abandonment.
I would never barf in your urine, Brenda. I am a Kraken from the sea.
ko: 나는 절대 네 유골 항아리에 토하지 않을 거야, 브렌다. 바다에서 온!

en: Hey, I'm here for the big show. I was thinking more like graphic designer.
ko: 안녕, 나는 큰 쇼를 보러 왔어.

en: Mid-thirties, you know, with a cool Asian girlfriend who dresses awesome and rocks out on the bass guitar.
ko: 베이스 기타를 잘 치는 그런 사람.

en: But I don't want to be too particular. Like it would be friggin' sweet if no one hit me.
ko: 아무도 나를 치지 않는다면 정말 좋을 텐데.
